name: Gourmet's Chicken Divan
recipeIngredient: 1 large broccoli head, cut into 4 pieces
1/4 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling, salted water, cook the broccoli for 6-8 minutes or until it is just tender. Drain well and keep warm.
2. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add flour and cook roux, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes.
3. Gradually add the broth, stirring to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer and stir occasionally for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking the mixture, stirring frequently, for an additional 10 minutes.
5. In a bowl, beat the cream until it holds stiff peaks. Gently fold the cream, sherry, and lemon juice into the sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Arrange broccoli on a flameproof baking dish or a 2-quart gratin dish. Pour half the sauce over the broccoli.
7. Stir 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese into the remaining sauce. Arrange the chicken breasts on top of the broccoli.
8. Pour the remaining sauce over the chicken and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
9. Broil under a preheated broiler, about 6 inches from the flame, for 1 minute or until the sauce is golden and bubbling.
